title: Specwright Eval Baseline
description: Baseline file for an eval suite. Compared against by `python -m evals --suite {suite} --compare-to-baseline`. Tokens shape mirrors RunResult.tokens from evals/framework/runner.py verbatim — NOT a normalized {input, output, total} shape.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this baseline was seeded

generated_from_commit.description: Git commit SHA (full or short) the baseline was seeded from

pass_rate_delta.description: Allowed pass-rate decrease before declaring a regression. Default 0.0 (zero tolerance).

duration_multiplier.description: Run duration may exceed baseline by this factor before declaring a regression. Default 1.25 (25% slack).

tokens_multiplier.description: Each token field may exceed baseline by this factor before declaring a regression. Default 1.20 (20% slack).

evals.description: Per-eval baseline metrics, keyed by eval id.

tokens.description: Token usage from the Claude CLI's RunResult.tokens dict, verbatim. Optional keys; missing keys are treated as zero by the comparator.

runs.description: Number of trials this baseline was seeded from
